svg.title: AS-REP Roasting Attack Flow
svg.desc: Diagram showing how AS-REP Roasting exploits accounts with pre-authentication disabled to extract and crack password hashes offline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is disabling Kerberos pre-authentication dangerous?')
sendPrompt('How does the attacker send an AS-REQ without knowing the password?')
sendPrompt('What does the KDC check in an AS-REP response?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the AS-REP response that makes it crackable?')
sendPrompt('What algorithm encrypts the AS-REP blob and how is it cracked?')
sendPrompt('How does the attacker extract and save the AS-REP hash?')
sendPrompt('How does hashcat crack AS-REP hashes and what wordlists work best?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between hashcat modes 18200 and 19800 for AS-REP roasting?')
sendPrompt('What can an attacker do once they crack the AS-REP hash and have the plaintext password?')
g.text: Attacker can now authenticate as target user → lateral movement / privilege escalation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me all the tools and commands for AS-REP roasting')
